title.en: REMOVING BARK OR VESTIGES OF BRANCHES (forestry A01G); SPLITTING WOOD; MANUFACTURE OF VENEER, WOODEN STICKS, WOOD SHAVINGS, WOOD FIBRES OR WOOD POWDER
Debarking or removing vestiges of branches from trees or logs (debarking by chemical treatment B27L3/00  {; peeling osier rods B27J3/00}); Machines therefor
{Debarking by non-rotatable tools}
by rubbing the trunks against each other (B27L1/04 takes precedence); Equipment for wet practice {(B27L1/14 takes precedence)}
by rubbing the trunks in rotating drums {(B27L1/025 takes precedence)}
Manually- operated or portable devices for debarking or for removing vestiges of branches
using rotating rings
using rotatable tools (B27L1/04, B27L1/08, B27L1/12 take precedence)
using pliable tools {, e.g. chains, cables}
using jets of fluid
Debarking by chemical treatment
Manufacture of veneer (working veneer or plywood B27D ){; Preparatory processing therefor (drying F26B)}
{Wood or veneer transporting devices (B27L5/022 takes precedence)}
{Cutting strips from a conical surface (pencil sharpeners B43L23/00; tapering poles B27M3/32)}
{Cutting strips from a trunk or piece by a rotating tool}
{Cutting strips with a band-knife or with a knife oscillating perpendicularly to the feed movement}
Cutting strips from a rotating trunk or piece; Veneer lathes {(B27L5/004 takes precedence)}

Cutting strips from a stationarily- held trunk or piece by a rocking knife carrier, or from rocking trunk or piece by a stationarily-held knife carrier; Veneer- cutting machines {(B27L5/004 takes precedence)}

Severing sheets or segments from veneer strips; Shearing devices therefor; Making veneer blanks, e.g. trimming to size {(making match sticks from veneer B27L9/00; making a layered cutting block B27L5/00)}
Arrangements for splitting wood
{Hand tools therefor (wedges, knives, spreaders, anvils per se B27L7/06)}
using rotating members {, e.g. rotating screws}
using wedges, knives or spreaders (B27L7/02 takes precedence)
using chopping blocks
Manufacture of wooden sticks, e.g. toothpicks (of walking sticks, of sticks for umbrellas B27M3/38; combined with other operations in the manufacture of matches C06F)

Manufacture of wood shavings, chips, powder, or the like (disintegrating in general B02C; edge trimming sawing blades or sawing tools combined with means to disintegrate waste B27B33/20; obtaining fibres for spinning D01B1/00; wet methods D21B1/12); Tools therefor
{Transporting devices for wood or chips}
{Tools therefor}

of wood shavings or the like
